attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
XXCFIR.TRANSACTION_ID       ,
XXCFIR.APPLICATION_NAME     ,
XXCFIR.APPLICATION_ID       ,
XXCFIR.LEDGER_ID   ,
XXCFIR.ORG_ID      ,
XXCFIR.TRX_CLASS   ,
XXCFIR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
XXCFIR.TRX_NUMBER ,
XXCFIR.TRX_DATE    ,
XXCFIR.TRX_LINE_ID ,
XXCFIR.TRX_LINE_NUM,
XXCFIR.TRANSACTION_SOURCE   ,
XXCFIR.CUST_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,
XXCFIR.CUSTOMER_ID ,
XXCFIR.PARTY_ID    ,
XXCFIR.PARTY_SITE_ID        ,
XXCFIR.PERIOD_YEAR ,
XXCFIR.PERIOD_NUM  ,
XXCFIR.UNIT_PRICE  ,
XXCFIR.AMOUNT      ,
XXCFIR.CURRENCY_CODE        ,
XXCFIR.HEADER_ID   ,
XXCFIR.ORDER_NUMBER ,
XXCFIR.ORDER_LINE_ID        ,
XXCFIR.ORDER_QUANTITY       ,
XXCFIR.CANCEL_QUANTITY      ,
XXCFIR.QUANTITY_INVOICED    ,
XXCFIR.SO_BOOKED_DATE       ,
XXCFIR.SO_LINE_NUM ,
XXCFIR.SO_SHIPMENT_DATE     ,
XXCFIR.SKU,
XXCFIR.EXPIRATION_DATE      ,
XXCFIR.ORDER_RMA_STATUS     ,
XXCFIR.PROCESS_STATUS       ,
XXCFIR.ELEMENT_TYPE,
XXCFIR.RULE_START_DATE,
XXCFIR.RULE_END_DATE ,
XXCFIR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      ,
XXCFIR.ERROR_MESSAGE        ,
XXCFIR.CREATION_DATE        ,
XXCFIR.CREATED_BY  ,
XXCFIR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE     ,
XXCFIR.LAST_UPDATED_BY      ,
XXCFIR.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN    ,
XXCFIR.REQUEST_ID  ,
XXCFIR.PROG_APPL_ID,
XXCFIR.PROG_ID     ,
XXCFIR.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE  ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE1  ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE2  ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE3  ,
/*XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE4  ,*/
CASE WHEN XXCFIR.TRANSACTION_SOURCE='CG1_NAT' and XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE4 IS NULL THEN
 'FSUB_ADJ'
ELSE
  ATTRIBUTE4
END ATTRIBUTE4,/* CASE added as a part of ATHENA DEC release 2021*/
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE5  ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE6  ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE7  ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE8  ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE9  ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE10 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE11 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE12 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE13 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE14 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE15 ,
XXCFIR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE16 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE17 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE18 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE19 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE20 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE21 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE22 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE23 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE24 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE25 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE26 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE27 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE28 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE29 ,
XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE30 ,
XXCFIR.TRAIL_FILE_NAME      ,
XXCFIR.SOURCE_DML_TYPE      ,
XXCFIR.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME   ,
XXCFIR.REFRESH_DATETIME     ,
XXCFIR.PROCESSED_FLAG,
XXCFIR.DATE_ATTRIBUTE46,
XXCFIR.DATE_ATTRIBUTE47,
XXCFIR.NUM_ATTRIBUTE51,
XXCFIR.NUM_ATTRIBUTE52,
XXCFIR.NUM_ATTRIBUTE53,
XXCFIR.NUM_ATTRIBUTE54  
FROM
(
SELECT XXCFIR.* FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXCFIR_REVENUE_EXTRACT_ALL  XXCFIR
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR
ON XXCFIR.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
WHERE   
 XXCFIR.APPLICATION_NAME = 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS' 
AND XXCFIR.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY XXCFIR.TRANSACTION_ID, XXCFIR.APPLICATION_ID  ORDER BY XXCFIR.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
)XXCFIR
WHERE XXCFIR.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
